introSection: Fēnix is a steel winged roller coaster located at Attractiepark Toverland in Sevenum, Limburg, Netherlands. It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened in 2018.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Fēnix was announced by Attractiepark Toverland in January 2017, with the name and theme being announced on 26 September 2017.

On 18 January 2018, it was announced that the ride would be opening on 7 July 2018 alongside the Avalon and Port Laguna themed areas.

On 4 June 2018, the ride had its first test run.

As expected, the ride opened on 7 July 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Fēnix's layout was revealed by Attractiepark Toverland in May 2017.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: The ride has light blue track and brown supports.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Fēnix is themed to the King Arthur/Merlin legend and is part of a new themed area opened in 2018 behind the Magische Vallei area. The area also contains a Mack Rides boat ride named Merlin's Quest.

fullText:
Fēnix is a steel winged roller coaster located at Attractiepark Toverland in Sevenum, Limburg, Netherlands. It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened in 2018.

Fēnix was announced by Attractiepark Toverland in January 2017, with the name and theme being announced on 26 September 2017.

On 18 January 2018, it was announced that the ride would be opening on 7 July 2018 alongside the Avalon and Port Laguna themed areas.

On 4 June 2018, the ride had its first test run.

As expected, the ride opened on 7 July 2018.

Fēnix's layout was revealed by Attractiepark Toverland in May 2017.

The ride has light blue track and brown supports.



Fēnix is themed to the King Arthur/Merlin legend and is part of a new themed area opened in 2018 behind the Magische Vallei area. The area also contains a Mack Rides boat ride named Merlin's Quest.
